# meok-eu-aigc-icon-mcp

> MEOK EU AIGC Icon MCP — EU AI Act Article 50 + Code of Practice 2nd draft AI-generated-content icon + labelling. 8 emitters for C2PA, HTML, image ICC, audio ID3, video keyframe. 2 Nov 2026 cliff. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- emit_icon_manifest_entry
- emit_html_meta_tags
- emit_image_icc_signal
- emit_audio_id3_signal
- emit_video_keyframe_signal
- get_icon_asset_uri
- code_of_practice_status
- sign_compliance_attestation

## Install
```
pip install meok-eu-aigc-icon-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-eu-aigc-icon-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
